# Tooltip

Styled tooltip component family built on zw-tooltip primitives.

<div class="zw-badge-row">
  <span class="zw-badge">@zeus-web/tooltip</span>
  <span class="zw-badge">zweb add tooltip</span>
  <span class="zw-badge">Generated</span>
</div>

## Add

```bash
zweb add tooltip
```

## Imports

Styled component:

```tsx
import {
  Tooltip,
  TooltipContent,
  TooltipTrigger,
} from '@/components/ui/tooltip'
```

Primitive React wrapper:

```tsx
import {
  Tooltip,
  TooltipContent,
  TooltipTrigger,
} from '@zeus-web/tooltip/react'
```

Web Component entry:

```ts
import '@zeus-web/tooltip/wc'
```

## Props

| Prop            | Type      | Default | Description                           |
| --------------- | --------- | ------- | ------------------------------------- |
| `open`          | `boolean` | -       | Controlled open state.                |
| `defaultOpen`   | `boolean` | -       | Initial open state.                   |
| `delayDuration` | `number`  | `300`   | Delay in milliseconds before opening. |

## Events

| Event         | React prop     | Detail                              | Description                      |
| ------------- | -------------- | ----------------------------------- | -------------------------------- |
| `open-change` | `onOpenChange` | `open: boolean, nativeEvent: Event` | Emitted when open state changes. |

## Slots

| Slot      | Description                  |
| --------- | ---------------------------- |
| `default` | Tooltip trigger and content. |

## Styling

Uses Tailwind: yes

Theme tokens:

- `bg-primary`
- `text-primary-foreground`

Internal selectors:

- `[data-slot=tooltip-trigger-control]`
- `[data-slot=tooltip-content]`

## Registry

Type: `registry:ui`

Dependencies:

- `@zeus-web/tooltip`
- `class-variance-authority`
- `clsx`
- `tailwind-merge`

Files:

- `default/lib/utils.ts` → `lib/utils.ts` (`registry:lib`)
- `default/tooltip.tsx` → `components/ui/tooltip.tsx` (`registry:ui`)

## AI usage rules

Do:

- Use Tooltip for short supplemental information.
- Keep tooltip content concise.

Do not:

- Do not put interactive controls inside TooltipContent.
- Do not rely on Tooltip for essential information.

## Examples

### React styled usage

```tsx
import { Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tooltip'\n\nexport function Example() {\n  return (\n    <Tooltip>\n      <TooltipTrigger>Hover me</TooltipTrigger>\n      <TooltipContent>Tooltip content</TooltipContent>\n    </Tooltip>\n  )\n}
```
